nasb.text: I will multiply the fruit of the tree and the produce of the field, so that you will not receive again the disgrace of famine among the nations.

esv.text: I will make the fruit of the tree and the increase of the field abundant, that you may never again suffer the disgrace of famine among the nations.

cnv.text: 我必使樹木的果子和田地的出產增多，好使你們在列國中不再因饑荒而遭受恥辱。

ccb.text: 我要使树木硕果累累，田间出产丰盛，免得你们因饥荒再被外族人讥笑。
